steps.title: Sum employees with 16 or more complete years from the table
steps.content:
Employees who have worked 16 or more complete years are in the rows 16 to 18 years and 19 to 21 years.

From the table: 16 to 18 years has 10 employees, and 19 to 21 years has 3 employees.

Therefore: $10 + 3 = 13$ employees have worked 16 or more complete years.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
